name: Token Focus Statusline
description: Information-dense Node.js statusline that makes actual token counts the primary focus. Displays real token numbers (e.g. 83k/200k) when they can be derived from the context window data, falling back to percentages gracefully. Lines changed are shown prominently, and cost uses 4 decimal places for precision.
features: Token counts as primary focus: shows '83k/200k ctx' when derivable
Derives total window size from used percentage if not provided directly
Falls back gracefully to percentage-only when token counts unavailable
Lines added/removed shown prominently in green/red
Cost with 4 decimal places for fine-grained precision
Context color escalates from green to yellow to red at 65% and 85% usage
